description: Sequential number identifying the order of an interval within its job/session.
Identifier for the individual gulper (informal pit latrine emptier) who performed the interval.
High-level phase of work observed (e.g. Earthworks, Equipment, Extraction, Fluidizing, Communication, Rest, Superstructure).
Specific physical activity performed within the task phase (e.g. Dig trench, Fetching water, Removing sludge). Blank for tasks with no further breakdown (e.g. Rest).
Clock time (HH:MM:SS) at which the interval began.
Clock time (HH:MM:SS) at which the interval ended.
Duration of the interval in seconds (entry_end_time minus entry_start_time).
Identifier linking the entry to its parent emptying job/session (date plus sequence number). Session-level metadata (date, location, enumerator) is stored separately and kept private.
Date of the emptying job session
column3: parsed from the leading date portion of job_id. Derived during data cleaning; not present in the raw files.

description: Name of the raw CSV file the entry originated from. Derived during data cleaning to preserve provenance after combining sessions.
